name: obsidian-mission-control
description: Turn your Obsidian vault into a mission control for Claude Code

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),os=require('os'),path=require('path');const dest=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude','skills','obsidian');fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});try{fs.copyFileSync(path.join(__dirname,'skills','obsidian.md'),path.join(dest,'SKILL.md'));console.log('Obsidian skill installed to ~/.claude/skills/obsidian/');}catch(e){console.warn('Could not install skill:',e.message);}"
